title: Pillow Talk
transcript:
Cueball: Staring at the ceiling, she asked me what I was thinking about.
Cueball: I should have made something up.
Cueball: The Bellman-Ford algorithm makes terrible pillow talk.
explanation:
The  is an algorithm that calculates the shortest path(s) through a weighted digraph or collection of connected nodes or vertices. The "Wexler" in the title text refers to Wexler's algorithm, which is used to deal with the inverse problem of , or simply stated: the electrical conductivity of an (inhomogenous) object.

Both of these would make terrible . Pillow talk is the conversation made by lovers after they have had sex, and is usually relaxed and intimate instead of technical.
